result.summary: Box exposes a developer platform with a REST API, a Box MCP Server, and a Box CLI; the corpus confirms developer apps are created in the Dev Console, but specific wire-level auth details are not determinable from these pages alone.

box_platform_app.label: Box Platform app credentials
box_platform_app.setup: Create a Box Platform application in the [Box Dev Docs home](https://developers.box.com/) flow by opening the Developer Console from the developer docs and creating your first application. Use the authentication guidance under the developer docs' authentication section to configure the app for your use case. The corpus confirms app creation in the Developer Console, but does not expose the exact credential fields on these pages.

surfaces.name: Box Platform API
surfaces.notes: The corpus clearly identifies Box Platform content APIs and includes OpenAPI URLs, but the scraped pages do not provide machine-readable auth details or request binding mechanics.

surfaces.name: Box MCP Server
surfaces.notes: The corpus explicitly lists a Box MCP Server in developer navigation and product pages, but does not include the MCP connect endpoint URL or authentication mechanics.

surfaces.name: Box CLI
surfaces.notes: The corpus identifies a CLI as a command line tool for the Box API, but does not include install instructions, command name, or login/auth flow details.
